title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind's Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that integrates frontier AI models with access to 30+ scientific databases and tools. It enables researchers to move from hypothesis to experimental design by orchestrating models, literature, and data in multi-step workflows.
